title: Audit Signal Usage Response Schema
description: Response schema for audit logging operations in OpenSignals Protocol. Confirms successful logging and provides acknowledgment details for audit trail completeness.

audit_id.description: Unique identifier of the original audit log entry (UUID v4 format). Matches the audit_id from the request.

response_id.description: Unique identifier for this response (UUID v4 format).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the audit log was processed and stored.

status.description: Status of the audit log submission. 'accepted' = successfully logged, 'accepted_with_warnings' = logged but with issues, 'rejected' = validation failed, 'pending' = queued for processing, 'failed' = system error during logging.

received.description: Whether the audit request was successfully received.

validated.description: Whether the audit data passed validation checks.

stored.description: Whether the audit log was successfully persisted to storage.

indexed.description: Whether the audit log was successfully indexed for search and retrieval.

replicated.description: Whether the audit log was replicated to backup systems (if applicable).

processing_result.description: Detailed breakdown of the audit log processing pipeline.

storage_location.description: Identifier or reference to where the audit log is stored.

storage_tier.description: Storage tier where the audit log was placed based on retention and access policies.

shard_id.description: Shard or partition identifier where the log is stored.

backup_status.description: Status of backup operations for this audit log.

encryption_status.description: Encryption status of the stored audit log.

storage_details.description: Information about where and how the audit log is stored.

schema_valid.description: Whether the audit data conforms to the schema.

business_rules_valid.description: Whether the audit data passes business rule validation.

integrity_check_passed.description: Whether data integrity checks passed (checksums, signatures, etc.).

field.description: Field name that caused the validation error.

severity.description: Severity level of the validation issue.

validation_results.description: Results of validation checks performed on the audit data.

recommendation.description: Recommended action to address the warning.

warnings.description: Non-critical warnings about the audit log submission.

sequence_number.description: Sequential number of this audit log in the overall chain.

previous_audit_id.description: Audit ID of the previous log entry for chain verification.

hash.description: Cryptographic hash of this audit log entry for integrity verification.

previous_hash.description: Hash of the previous audit log entry, creating a tamper-evident chain.

signature.description: Digital signature of this audit log entry.

signing_authority.description: Entity that signed this audit log.

chain_of_custody.description: Chain of custody information for creating tamper-evident audit trails.

retention_start_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when retention period begins.

deletion_scheduled_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when automatic deletion is scheduled.

legal_hold.description: Whether this audit log is under legal hold (prevents deletion).

retention_policy_id.description: Identifier of the retention policy applied.

retention_confirmation.description: Confirmation of retention policy applied to this audit log.

compliant.description: Whether the audit log meets requirements for this regulation.

compliance_confirmations.description: Confirmation of compliance with various regulatory requirements.

access_level.description: Access level classification for this audit log.

authorized_roles.description: Roles authorized to access this audit log.

redacted_fields.description: Fields that have been redacted for privacy or security.

access_control.description: Access control settings for the stored audit log.

notifications_sent.description: List of notifications sent about this audit event.

alerts_triggered.description: Alerts triggered based on audit event analysis.

notification_status.description: Status of notifications and alerts related to this audit event.

query_url.description: URL to query or retrieve this specific audit log.

search_indexed.description: Whether this audit log is available in search indexes.

api_accessible.description: Whether this audit log can be retrieved via API.

export_formats.description: Available export formats for this audit log.

query_access.description: Information about how to access and query this audit log.

audit_id.description: Audit ID of a related log entry.

relationship.description: Type of relationship to this audit log.

related_audits.description: References to related audit log entries.

audit_service_version.description: Version of the audit logging service that processed this request.

processing_node.description: Identifier of the processing node that handled this request.

schema_version.description: Version of the audit schema used.

environment.description: Environment where the audit was logged.

system_metadata.description: System-level metadata about the audit logging infrastructure.

validation_time_ms.description: Time spent on validation in milliseconds.

storage_time_ms.description: Time spent storing the audit log in milliseconds.

indexing_time_ms.description: Time spent indexing the audit log in milliseconds.

queue_wait_time_ms.description: Time spent waiting in queue before processing in milliseconds.

performance_metrics.description: Performance metrics for the audit logging operation.

error_code.description: Machine-readable error code if status is failed or rejected.

recoverable.description: Whether the error is recoverable and retry is recommended.

retry_after_seconds.description: Suggested seconds to wait before retrying.

error_details.description: Error details if the audit logging operation failed.

description.description: Description of the action and its purpose.

deadline.description: Deadline for completing this action (if applicable).

next_actions.description: Recommended next actions based on the audit event.
